name: HR managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 timesheets/month tool
description: For HR managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 timesheets/month, exceeding policy limits causes compliance issues. We alert HR ops instead of manual tracking of timesheets and hours.
target_audience: HR managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 timesheets/month
problem_solved: Monitoring employee hours to prevent policy violations
